name: vasp-cli
description: The Vasp CLI — declarative full-stack framework for Vue developers

scripts.build: rm -rf dist templates starters && bun build ./bin/vasp.ts --target=bun --outfile=dist/vasp --minify --banner='#!/usr/bin/env bun' && chmod +x dist/vasp && mkdir -p templates starters && cp -R ../../templates/. ./templates && cp -R ../../templates/starters/. ./starters
